```
import modal
from pathlib import Path

# Path to your local data folder
local_data_path = Path("./my_local_dataset")

image = (
    modal.Image.debian_slim()
    # This copies the local folder into /root/data inside the container
    .add_local_dir(local_data_path, remote_path="/root/data")
)

app = modal.App("my-app", image=image)

@app.function()
def process_data():
    # Now you can access it like a normal file path
    with open("/root/data/config.json", "r") as f:
        print(f.read())
```

I want to be able to access my `datasets` folder while in the modal remote environment. Is this the right approach?
